description: Phase 5 - Unified Product Shell and Design System: Expand shared-ui with unified app shell components (global nav, app switcher, notification center, workspace switcher, user menu, AI dock), standardize design tokens (add density, elevation, responsive breakpoints, a11y states), add shared route/auth guards, onboarding flow skeleton, consistent empty/loading/error/success states, and cross-app microfeatures (app launcher, recent items, starred items, universal notifications, universal sharing modal, unified profile card, global AI side panel, global command menu integration)
steps: 1. Expand packages/shared-ui/src/themes/tokens.ts - add density tokens (compact/normal/comfortable), elevation scale (0-5), responsive breakpoints (sm/md/lg/xl/2xl), focus/hover/active/disabled accessibility states, motion (reduced-motion support).

2. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/ directory with: GlobalNav.tsx (top navigation bar with app switcher trigger, search, notifications, user menu), AppSwitcher.tsx (grid of app icons with current indicator), NotificationCenter.tsx (bell icon + dropdown with notification list), WorkspaceSwitcher.tsx (dropdown to switch workspaces), UserMenu.tsx (avatar + dropdown with profile, settings, logout), AIDock.tsx (floating AI assistant entry point at bottom-right).

3. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/CommandMenu.tsx - wraps the existing CommandPalette class into a React component with Cmd+K shortcut, grouped commands, fuzzy search, keyboard navigation.

4. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/States/ directory with: EmptyState.tsx (icon + title + description + optional action), LoadingState.tsx (spinner/skeleton variants), ErrorState.tsx (error icon + message + retry button), SuccessState.tsx (checkmark + message + optional next action).

5. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/AppLauncher.tsx (grid of all quant apps with icons and labels), RecentItems.tsx (list of recently accessed items across apps), StarredItems.tsx (user's starred/bookmarked items), SharingModal.tsx (unified permission picker + share link generator), ProfileCard.tsx (hover card showing user info, role, status).
6. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/AISidePanel.tsx - slide-out panel for AI interactions, accepts messages array and onSend callback.

7. Create packages/shared-ui/src/guards/ directory with: AuthGuard.tsx (React component that checks auth state, redirects to login if not authenticated), RouteGuard.tsx (checks role-based access), OnboardingGuard.tsx (redirects to onboarding if user has not completed setup).

8. Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Onboarding/ directory with: OnboardingFlow.tsx (multi-step wizard container), OnboardingStep.tsx (individual step with title, content, progress), WelcomeStep.tsx, WorkspaceSetupStep.tsx, ConnectAppsStep.tsx, AIPreferencesStep.tsx.
9. Update packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts to export all new components.

10. Add tests in packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/shell-components.test.tsx covering: GlobalNav renders, AppSwitcher lists apps, NotificationCenter toggles, CommandMenu opens on Cmd+K, EmptyState/LoadingState/ErrorState/SuccessState render correctly, AuthGuard redirects when unauthenticated.
11. Run pnpm typecheck, pnpm build, pnpm test, pnpm lint to confirm all gates pass.
acceptance_criteria: Design tokens include density, elevation, responsive breakpoints, accessibility states
Shell components exist: GlobalNav, AppSwitcher, NotificationCenter, WorkspaceSwitcher, UserMenu, AIDock, CommandMenu
State components exist: EmptyState, LoadingState, ErrorState, SuccessState
Cross-app microfeature components exist: AppLauncher, RecentItems, StarredItems, SharingModal, ProfileCard, AISidePanel
Onboarding flow components exist: OnboardingFlow, OnboardingStep, WelcomeStep, WorkspaceSetupStep, ConnectAppsStep, AIPreferencesStep
All new components are exported from packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts
Tests cover new shell components and pass
findings: All quality gates pass: 71 typecheck, 50 build, 74 test (89 tests in shared-ui, 32 new shell tests), 60 lint. Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged hook. No issues with existing components or exports.
